content.en:
Chaos, the Void Realm.

This is the Dao Realm of the Void Heaven One Vein, a Dao Realm created by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Any Dao Ancestor has the ability to create a Dao Realm, but this Dao Realm is different from the naturally born Dao Realm, just like the Dao Realm created by the Ordinary One Heaven Dao Ancestor is much stronger than some of the Great Universes, and even the Quasi-Dao Realm where Ye Tian is located is far inferior.

And the Void Heaven Realm is not an ordinary Dao Realm, and it is not weak in the Dao Realm.

Now.

The essence of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor left the void outside the Quasi-Dao Realm and returned to the Void Heaven Realm.

Regarding the departure of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, the other Dao Ancestors did not react, after all, they could not enter the Quasi-Dao Realm at present, and many Dao Ancestors often left and returned, this kind of behavior was normal.

But no one expected that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor would return to the Void Heaven Realm with 3,000 Merge Dao Treasures.

If you knew, I am afraid that there would be a bunch of Dao Ancestors to besiege and kill the Void Heaven Dao Ancestors, and even the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors would put down their subordinates and make a move.

After all, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is currently only a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and it is not the kind that is almost invincible among the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, a few top Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors and a group of Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestors in the outside world are enough to kill the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

If the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor made a move, he could easily suppress the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

It was precisely because he was worried about being exposed that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor did not make a noise.

Void Heaven, a mysterious space.

This is the sleeping place of the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven One Lineage, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is ready to wake up these True Ancestors and let them try to break through first.

Of course, there were still many active top-notch True Ancestors in the Void Heaven Realm, but most of them were wandering through the chaos, or waiting outside the Quasi-Dao Realm to enter the Dao Realm that was about to be promoted.

If the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor summoned back these top True Ancestors, it would definitely attract the attention of other forces.

Therefore, let these top True Ancestors who had been sleeping for countless years break through the Dao Ancestor realm, and absolutely no one would notice.

"Wake up!"

The voice of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor echoed in every corner of this sleeping space, and an ancient top True Ancestor who was in a deep sleep woke up.

Rumble!!!!!

One by one, the top True Ancestors flew out of the Sleeping Land and came to the Void Heaven Dao Ancestors, and they all bowed:

"Meet the Master!"

"Meet Dao Ancestor!"

"Meet Dao Ancestor!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor looked at the nearly a hundred top True Ancestors in front of him and nodded with satisfaction.

These top-notch True Ancestors had all gone to the extreme along the way to the True Ancestors, and each of them was very powerful in combat power, and several of them had even killed an ordinary Heavenly Dao Ancestor before the ancient years.

It's a pity that they were born at the wrong time, they didn't encounter such an opportunity as the Domain Realm Fragment, and they didn't break through to the Dao Ancestor Realm after cultivating for a long time.

True Ancestor is not an eternal immortal existence, if a cosmic epoch time is an epoch year, the Heavenly Monarch can live for hundreds of cosmic epoch years, the True Monarch can live for tens of thousands of cosmic epoch years, and the True Ancestor can live for millions of cosmic epoch years.

A cosmic epoch is an incomparably long time, and a million cosmic epochs are unimaginably long, but for Dao Ancestors, the millions of cosmic epochs are not very long.

Therefore, the True Ancestor who is about to die of old age in the chaos will take the initiative to sleep, making the passage of time slow down, so that he can live for a long, long time.

In fact, relying on the method of sleeping, it would not be a problem for True Ancestors to live for hundreds of millions of cosmic epochs.

Because of the problem of longevity, unless there are special circumstances, a force will not awaken the ancient true ancestor who has been sleeping for a long time.

Therefore, these hundreds of top True Ancestors thought that the Void Heaven Pulse had encountered a catastrophe.

"Master, isn't the Void Heaven Vein attacked by a strong enemy?"

An Ancient True Ancestor asked nervously.

He is the second disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, he followed the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor when the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was very weak, but unfortunately his talent was limited and he failed to step into the realm of the Dao Ancestor, but he also survived, unlike many True Ancestors who died in exploration and battle.

"Xuheng, the Void Heaven is very good, there is no danger, this time to wake you up, there is a great opportunity for you, this great opportunity can make you have hope to ascend to the realm of Dao Ancestor!" said Void Heaven Dao Ancestor with a smile.

"What, so that we have hope of ascending to the Dao Ancestor realm?"

Hundreds of Ancient True Ancestors couldn't believe it.

They all took the initiative to fall into a deep sleep because there was no hope of breakthrough, they didn't have much to live for, or they were tired of cultivating.

But now, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said that they had the hope of becoming a Dao Ancestor, which was incredible!

Immediately, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor took out the Merge Dao treasure and said: "Your biggest problem is the unity of the spirit and spirit, so as to make your own Dao and the spirit and spirit in one fell swoop, and each of these Merge Dao treasures can be increased by one to two percent, if you refine multiple Merge Dao treasures, it is enough to increase your probability of increasing by more than fifty percent." I believe that with your background, there should be a good chance of becoming a Dao Ancestor!"

"Hedao treasure, oh my God, there is such a treasure!!"

Hundreds of True Ancestors were crazy, and they couldn't wait to snatch such a treasure immediately, but they weren't crazy enough to snatch the treasure from the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, otherwise they would be looking for death!

"This is a treasure that one of my personal disciples got from a ruin, it is extremely precious, you must not divulge it, and everyone can obtain such a treasure of the Convergence Dao, but these are the treasures of my personal disciple after all, you need to pay some resources and treasures in exchange for the treasures of the Convergence Dao. Everyone should take out half of their net worth, isn't that too much?" the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor proposed.

"Not too much!"

Hundreds of True Ancestors said one after another.

Half of the net worth is nothing, for them, those treasure resources are useless, if they can be exchanged for a chance to impact the Dao Ancestor, even the entire net worth can be traded.

Immediately.

A True Ancestor exchanged half of his net worth for ten Hedao treasures from the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, no matter how much he had, it was useless, it was really a waste.

Seeing the net worth of these True Ancestors, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was also a little moved, although he was the founder of the Void Heaven lineage, but he was also very short of resources.

With so many treasures accumulated, it is enough to rival his net worth!

And he is a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, an existence who is about to be promoted to a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, what a huge amount of his net worth!

Sometimes, a single treasure he obtained was enough to surpass the entire net worth of countless True Ancestors.

It can be seen from this that the net worth of these true ancestors is very rich.

Of course, he didn't have the idea of greedy for these resource treasures, so he would still hand them over to Ye Tian.

"Go and break through, and strive to break through all of them to become Dao Ancestor!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor encouraged.

He did not leave the Void Heaven Realm, but guarded here to prevent anyone from disturbing them and attacking the Dao Ancestor Realm.

Time passed little by little, and hundreds of True Ancestors began to impact the Dao Ancestor Realm in the Void Heaven Realm, and the rules of the entire Void Heaven Realm vaguely changed.

The countless disciples of the Void Heaven Realm were vaguely aware of the changes in the Void Heaven Realm, but they didn't know what was happening.

Ten years later, on this day.

Rumble!!!!!

The origin of the Chaos Avenue descended, and a majestic figure sat in the middle of the avenue, merging with the avenue.

This is the time of the Merger, and at the critical juncture of the Merchant.

"Someone is merging, which true ancestor is it?"

Countless disciples in the Void Heaven Realm were shocked.

Many disciples didn't know this ancient true ancestor, but some still did.

"It's the Void Heng True Ancestor, the second personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, an incomparably ancient True Ancestor, but he has no news for millions of cosmic epochs, and it is rumored that he has died of old age, but I didn't expect that he is now impacting the realm of the Dao Ancestor!"

A True Ancestor of the Early Stage of the Great Dao exclaimed.

Soon, the fusion came to the final step.

Rumble!!!!!

Endless golden light illuminated the entire Void Heaven Realm, and golden flowers bloomed in this chaotic region.

This is the Great Dao Golden Flower, and it is the Origin of Chaos congratulating the birth of a Dao Ancestor!

In an instant, all images disappeared, and a majestic figure stood in the void, overlooking the endless sky.

"Congratulations to Xuheng Dao Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to Xuheng Dao Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to Xuheng Dao Ancestor!"

Countless disciples of the Void Heaven One Pulse congratulated.

The birth of a Dao Ancestor made the Void Heaven One Vein stronger, and all the disciples were very excited.

"That's right, just breaking through is a Dao Ancestor at the peak of the First Heaven Heaven! After cultivating for a while, you can hit the Second Heaven Dao Ancestor!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor commented.

At this moment, the vision of another True Ancestor impacting the Dao Ancestor emerged.
